summary: Phase 2 refactoring complete - All 5 newly extracted tab components (AssignmentsTab, ShipmentsTab, DeliveriesTab, SettlementsTab, BillingTab) verified working correctly. All 9 tabs in DistributorDetail.js are functional with proper data display, buttons, and dialogs.

details: Tab shows 'Account Assignments (1)' with existing assignment
Table displays columns: Account, Servicing City, Location, Type, Override, Status, Actions
Shows 'Test Status Validation Company' assigned to Margao as Primary
Assign Account button (data-testid='assign-account-btn') works
Dialog opens with searchable account input, servicing city selector, location selector
Primary/Backup distributor checkboxes and Special Margin Override section functional
Tab shows 'Shipments (4)' with existing shipments
Table displays columns: Shipment #, Date, Location, Qty, Amount, Status, Actions
Shows shipments SHP-2026-0002, 0003, 0004 with status badges (Delivered, Cancelled)
Create Shipment button (data-testid='create-shipment-btn') works
Dialog opens with: Destination Location, Shipment Date, Expected Delivery Date, Vehicle info, Shipment Items section
Tab shows 'Deliveries (6)' with existing deliveries
Table displays columns: Delivery #, Date, Account, Qty, Amount, Margin, Status, Actions
Shows deliveries DEL-2026-0001 to 0006 with status badges (Delivered, Cancelled)
Record Delivery button (data-testid='create-delivery-btn') works
Dialog opens with searchable account selection showing assigned accounts, From Location, Delivery Date, Delivery Items section
Tab shows 'Settlements (1)' with existing settlement
Table displays columns: Settlement #, Period, Deliveries, Amount, Payout, Status, Actions
Shows settlement STL-2026-0002 with Monthly period and Draft status
Generate Settlement button (data-testid='create-settlement-btn') works
Dialog opens with Period Type selector (Weekly/Bi-Weekly/Monthly/Custom), Period Start/End dates, Remarks
Summary cards display: Base Prices Configured (1), Unreconciled Deliveries (1), Net Balance (₹10,525 Payable), Pending Credit Notes (₹10,525)
Base Prices & Margins info card with 'Go to Margins Tab' button present
Reconciliations section with New Reconciliation button (data-testid='new-reconciliation-btn')
Reconciliations table shows REC-2026-0001, 0002, 0003 with status badges (Confirmed, Draft)
Debit/Credit Notes section shows CN-2026-0001, CN-2026-0002 with Credit Note badges and Partially Paid status
OverviewTab: Basic Info, Contact Info, Commercial Terms cards display correctly
CoverageTab: 6 cities displayed with Add Coverage button functional
LocationsTab: Location card for 'Test' (LOC-001) with Add Location button functional
MarginsTab: City selector (Gurugram), Active & Ongoing toggle, 9 margin entries, Add Price Entry button all functional

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 2 refactoring successfully reduced DistributorDetail.js from 4,340 to 2,821 lines (35% reduction from Phase 1, 47% total from original)
All 5 new tab components properly import from UI components and use shared constants
data-testid attributes maintained for all buttons: assign-account-btn, create-shipment-btn, create-delivery-btn, create-settlement-btn, new-reconciliation-btn
Props are correctly passed from parent component to all child tab components
Complex features like searchable account selection in DeliveriesTab working correctly
seed_data_creation: No new test data created - used existing distributor 'Test' (DIST-0002)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 tabs in DistributorDetail.js have been extracted and verified working: OverviewTab, CoverageTab, LocationsTab, MarginsTab (Phase 1) + AssignmentsTab, ShipmentsTab, DeliveriesTab, SettlementsTab, BillingTab (Phase 2). Total file reduction from ~5,350 lines to 2,821 lines (47% reduction). Components are in /app/frontend/src/components/distributor/ directory.
